task: Add a premium owner agent control center to the Property Portal template.
audience: Independent property owners, boutique agencies, and implementation partners
first_read: One accountable specialist team, visible authority, measurable outcomes, and zero unsafe actions enabled.

references.label: Existing Property Portal operating surfaces
references.reason: Preserve the established operational density, navigation, status, and form language.

direction.signature: Every mission is paired with its authority and proof rather than presented as autonomous magic.

asset_quality.why_premium: The product UI itself is the correct primary asset for this protected operational surface.

artifacts.notes: Playwright-core full-page capture at 1440x1200; hierarchy, authority panel, mission form, lifecycle, team table, and scorecard inspected.
Playwright-core full-page capture at 390x844; navigation scroll, text wrapping, control sizing, stack order, and page width inspected.

checks.name: asset-tier
checks.evidence: Tier C product UI is the correct medium for an owner operations console.

checks.name: export-inspection
checks.evidence: Owned full-page captures exist at artifacts/visual-qa for 1440px desktop and 390px mobile.

checks.name: visual-qa
checks.evidence: Automated root overflow and clipped-control checks passed at both viewports; captures show no overlap and a coherent mobile stack.

score.notes: Strong hierarchy, operational clarity, responsiveness, and authority signaling. Final three points depend on production owner content, live runtime state, and repeated owner usability evidence.

known_risks: Sample property media remains unsuitable for a real client launch.
Production transition persistence is not enabled by the UI.
